name: Password Policy Discovery
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Ömer Günal, oscd.community, Pawel Mazur
SIGMA Title: Password Policy Discovery
SIGMA Description: Detects password policy discovery commands

False positives:
- Legitimate administration activities

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND ((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%path%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/pam.d/common-password%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/security/pwquality.conf%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/pam.d/system-auth%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/login.defs%')) OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%chage%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%--list%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%-l%')) OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%passwd%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-s%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%--status%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Password Policy Discovery on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND ((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%path%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/pam.d/common-password%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/security/pwquality.conf%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/pam.d/system-auth%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/etc/login.defs%')) OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%chage%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%--list%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%-l%')) OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%passwd%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-s%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%--status%'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Ömer Günal, oscd.community, Pawel Mazur SIGMA Title: Password Policy Discovery SIGMA Description: Detects password policy discovery commands  False positives: - Legitimate administration activities  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
